description.unified: Deals ??? P.DMG to enemies within range, and the first attack knocks them down for [1.8 sec->3 sec] and reduces their DEF Penetration by [300->250] for [4 sec->10 sec].
All allies' ATK is increased by ???, ATK Spd by [36%->300] and P.DEF by ??? for [6 sec->15 sec]. Upon activation, dispels all negative effects from allies.

Deals ??? P.DMG over 12 times to nearby enemies within a circular range of self and draws them in while use. While using the Skill, gains immunity to CC. The last attack freezes the enemy for [2.4 sec->4 sec].
Increases own ATK by ???, CC resist by 30, and DMG to Non-Hero enemies by 1.5% every sec. This effect can be stacked up to max 20 times. At 20 stacks or more, increases DMG of normal attacks by 100%.

dark.unified: ATK Spd boost of 200 is added to the effect.

description.unified: [Smash] Reduces the target's ATK by [25%->20%] and increases P.DMG target receives by {0}% for 10 sec.
[Battle Roar] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases target's Crit DMG by {0}% for the duration of Skill.
[Vortex] DMG is increased by 50%, and the last hit increases All DMG the target takes by {0}% for 10 sec.
Increases own Max HP by {0}%. Normal attacks have a 15% chance of dealing additional P.DMG equal to {1}% of ATK and freezing them for 2 sec.
